claim_boundary: fixture-backed comparison; empirical comparison pipeline; not an empirical validation claim; not a formal proof substitute

eht.citation_note: Derived from published M87* and Sgr A* summary observables.
eht.limitations: Published summary observables only; no raw imaging products are stored.
preprocessing_steps: Retrieved lightweight public abstract pages where accessible.
Stored a compact derived table of published ring and shadow observables.
eht.source_name: Published Event Horizon Telescope summary observables

galaxy.citation_note: Compact NGC2403 rotation curve derived from the SPARC public archive.
galaxy.license_note: Derived compact CSV from SPARC public rotation curves.
galaxy.limitations: A single lightweight representative galaxy curve is stored in this run.
preprocessing_steps: Normalized radius and velocity columns for the repository comparison adapter while retaining raw columns.

hawking.citation_note: Use an analogue-Hawking or PBH-limit publication-specific dataset in a later manual pass.
hawking.license_note: No public compact dataset is bundled in this run.
hawking.limitations: Reliable lightweight public tables were not automatically acquired in this run.
preprocessing_steps: Did not fabricate or infer a lightweight dataset when a reliable compact public table was not guaranteed.
hawking.source_name: Analogue Hawking or PBH limit literature

ligo.citation_note: Derived single-detector GW150914 ringdown segment from the H1 public strain file.
ligo.license_note: Derived lightweight ringdown segment from GWOSC public strain data.
ligo.limitations: Single-detector derived ringdown proxy only; not a full LIGO parameter-estimation product.
preprocessing_steps: Downloaded the public GWOSC H1 strain HDF5 for the O1 interval containing GW150914.
Applied a simple 35-350 Hz Butterworth bandpass filter.
Selected a short post-merger ringdown window and normalized the strain amplitude for lightweight comparison use.

redshift.citation_note: Includes Pound-Rebka and Gravity Probe A published benchmark values.
redshift.license_note: Compact derived benchmark table for repository-linked comparison use.
redshift.limitations: Structured raw public benchmark tables are not guaranteed for these experiments.
preprocessing_steps: Collected lightweight public provenance pages where accessible.
Constructed a compact derived benchmark table from published benchmark values.
Normalized observable_x and shift columns for the repository comparison adapter.
